### SUGGESTION
- `services/task.service.js:286` — The `updateTask` function uses `prisma.task.update` without an explicit `try/catch` wrapping it to catch `P2025` (Record to update not found). — OPEN
- `services/sprint.service.js:58` — Added `version` to the select projection in `getSprintsByProject`. Ensure clients handle optimistic locking accurately when updating states. — OPEN
